transcript: Speaker A: तुमने खाना खाया? [Did you eat food?] Speaker B: Yes, I gone to hotel. Speaker A: "I gone to hotel" नहीं, "I went to the restaurant" होता है। [Not "I gone to hotel", it is "I went to the restaurant".] Speaker B: क्या? अरे! [What? Oh!] Speaker A: होटल का मतलब होता है जहाँ रात को रुकते हैं। खाना खाने की जगह को रेस्टोरेंट कहते हैं। [Hotel means where you stay at night. The place to eat food is called a restaurant.] Speaker B: ओहो... ठीक है, ठीक है। मुझे इंग्लिश अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Oh... okay, okay. I don't know English very well.] Speaker A: कोई प्रॉब्लम नहीं, AI teachers ट्राई किया? [No problem, did you try AI teachers?] Speaker B: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?] Speaker A: बिल्कुल नहीं! नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: पर टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.] Speaker A: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट की प्रैक्टिस काफी है। बिल्कुल कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगी। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Speaker B: वाओ! कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker A: ये इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ और MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें इम्प्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगी। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ! [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. In just 15 days you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started!] Speaker C: इंस्टॉल नाउ पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Tumne khana khaya? [Did you eat food?] Yes, I gone to hotel. I gone to hotel. I went to the restaurant. Hotel ka matlab hota hai jahan rehte hain. Khana khane ki jagah ko restaurant kehte hain! [Hotel means where you stay. The place to eat food is called a restaurant!] Oh... theek hai, mujhe English achhe se nahi aati. [Oh... okay, I don't know English very well.] Koi problem nahi, AI teachers try kiya? [No problem, did you try AI teachers?] Woh toh mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?] Bilkul nahi! Normal English classes se 7 guna sasta hai isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all! It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes, that's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.] Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.] Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.] Wow! Kaise join karun? [Wow! How do I join?] Yeh install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app.] Sirf 15 dinon mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo shuru ho jao! [In just 15 days you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started!] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a human's English grammar mistake in a split-screen conversation. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable and convenient way to learn English with daily practice. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
